Container.Name: readwise-remarkable
Container.Overview: Automatically sync documents tagged "remarkable" from Readwise Reader to your reMarkable tablet via rmapi.
Container.Description: Syncs Readwise Reader articles to reMarkable tablet. Tag documents with "remarkable" in Readwise Reader and they get uploaded as EPUBs to your reMarkable cloud.

Config.Name: Readwise Token
Config.Description: Your Readwise access token from https://readwise.io/access_token

Config.Name: reMarkable Folder
Config.Description: Folder on reMarkable where documents are uploaded

Config.Name: Sync Locations
Config.Description: Readwise locations to sync from (comma-separated: new,later,shortlist,archive,feed)

Config.Name: Sync Tag
Config.Description: Tag name to filter documents by in Readwise

Config.Name: Persistent Data
Config.Description: Stores rmapi auth token and export tracker
